ADME System Database A · ASCC

ASCC Monitoring & Evaluation Workspace

Database A of the ADME System brings together the ASEAN Socio-Cultural Community's initiative tracking and outcome-document monitoring into a single evidence base — spanning 10 Member States, 15 sectoral bodies, and the strategic measures of the ASCC Blueprint.

DATABASE A · TWO MODULES LIVE
Welcome, Guest User. Select a module below to explore the monitoring dashboards.
● LIVE PROTOTYPE 📊
ASCC Initiatives Dashboard
Portfolio-level monitoring of sectoral body activities across workplan cycles — delivery performance, strategic-pillar alignment, and a filterable activity monitor mapped to ASCC Blueprint strategic measures.
63Activities
4Zones
15Sectoral Bodies
● LIVE PROTOTYPE 📑
Outcome Documents Dashboard
Executive intelligence view of ASCC declarations, statements and conventions — Member State follow-up coverage on an interactive map, distribution by sectoral body, document-type breakdown, and SDG mapping.
12Declarations
10Member States
17SDG Mapped
Prototype note. Both dashboards are interactive prototypes populated with representative sample data for demonstration. They render exactly as built by the development team — this workspace wraps them with a shared login and navigation layer so the two modules of Database A can be reviewed together in a single journey.
